# planetary

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/planetary"
```

Package planetary calculates Chaldean planetary hours based on sunrise and sunset times for a given location and date.

CalcPlanetaryHours returns a full PlanetaryDay with all 24 planetary hours, the day ruler, and sunrise/sunset times. CurrentPlanetaryHour identifies which planetary hour is active at a specific moment.

## Index

- [type PlanetaryDay](<#PlanetaryDay>)
  - [func CalcPlanetaryHours\(jdUT, lat, lon float64\) \(\*PlanetaryDay, error\)](<#CalcPlanetaryHours>)
- [type PlanetaryHour](<#PlanetaryHour>)
  - [func CurrentPlanetaryHour\(jdUT, lat, lon float64\) \(\*PlanetaryHour, error\)](<#CurrentPlanetaryHour>)


<a name="PlanetaryDay"></a>
## type [PlanetaryDay](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/planetary/hours.go#L21-L27>)

PlanetaryDay holds the planetary day ruler and all 24 hours

```go
type PlanetaryDay struct {
    DayRuler    models.PlanetID `json:"day_ruler"`
    Sunrise     float64         `json:"sunrise_jd"`
    Sunset      float64         `json:"sunset_jd"`
    NextSunrise float64         `json:"next_sunrise_jd"`
    Hours       []PlanetaryHour `json:"hours"`
}
```

<a name="CalcPlanetaryHours"></a>
### func [CalcPlanetaryHours](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/planetary/hours.go#L45>)

```go
func CalcPlanetaryHours(jdUT, lat, lon float64) (*PlanetaryDay, error)
```

CalcPlanetaryHours computes the 24 planetary hours for a given date and location. Uses actual sunrise/sunset times calculated via Sun position.

<a name="PlanetaryHour"></a>
## type [PlanetaryHour](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/planetary/hours.go#L12-L18>)

PlanetaryHour represents a single planetary hour

```go
type PlanetaryHour struct {
    Number  int             `json:"number"` // 1-24
    Planet  models.PlanetID `json:"planet"`
    StartJD float64         `json:"start_jd"`
    EndJD   float64         `json:"end_jd"`
    IsDay   bool            `json:"is_day"`
}
```

<a name="CurrentPlanetaryHour"></a>
### func [CurrentPlanetaryHour](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/planetary/hours.go#L108>)

```go
func CurrentPlanetaryHour(jdUT, lat, lon float64) (*PlanetaryHour, error)
```

CurrentPlanetaryHour returns the planetary hour active at the given JD
